description_long: This is a large, floor-standing arcade music game machine, specifically a Beatmania III cabinet. The front features a prominent display screen at the top, flanked by two vertical speaker columns with multiple blue-ringed speakers. Below the screen is a control panel with turntables, buttons, and sliders, designed for interactive rhythm gameplay. The lower section houses a sturdy base with two foot pedals extending outward, used for additional game controls. The machine is primarily black with metallic and colored accents, and the branding 'beatmania III' is clearly visible on the display. The overall structure is robust, with a deep cabinet and reinforced sides to withstand frequent public use.
description: A large, black Beatmania III arcade music game machine with a screen, speakers, control panel, and foot pedals. It features prominent branding and interactive controls for rhythm gameplay.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, speaker columns, control panel with turntables and buttons, and two foot pedals.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet and the protruding control panel and foot pedals.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, featureless back panel with a recessed top section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and the side profile of the control panel and pedals.
